# Quorum LLM entrypoint

Primary startup files:
- INIT.md
- AGENTS.md
- docs/REPO_MAP.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- docs/CURRENT_MODE.md

Key runtime files:
- apps/api/app/main.py
- apps/api/app/api/routes.py
- apps/api/app/domain/models.py
- apps/api/app/services/event_log.py
- apps/api/app/services/state_store.py
- apps/api/app/services/policy_engine.py
- apps/api/app/services/quorum_engine.py
- apps/api/app/services/executor.py
- apps/api/app/services/health_checks.py

Configuration:
- config/system.yaml
- config/agents.yaml
- config/policies.yaml

Examples:
- examples/demo_incident.json
- examples/sample_proposal.json
